inferno_blast.name: Inferno Blast
inferno_blast.description: Engulfs the stadium in flames, scorching the opponent's blade.

tidal_crush.name: Tidal Crush
tidal_crush.description: A surging wave of force crashes into the opposing blade.

gale_cutter.name: Gale Cutter
gale_cutter.description: Razor-sharp wind slices through the stadium at blinding speed.

terra_smash.name: Terra Smash
terra_smash.description: The ground trembles as a massive impact rattles the opponent.

thunder_lance.name: Thunder Lance
thunder_lance.description: A bolt of electric fury strikes the opponent dead center.

frost_fang.name: Frost Fang
frost_fang.description: Jagged ice shards tear into the opponent's rotation.

shadow_rift.name: Shadow Rift
shadow_rift.description: A rift of pure darkness opens beneath the enemy blade.

radiant_nova.name: Radiant Nova
radiant_nova.description: A blinding flash of light overloads the opponent's defenses.

eruption_drive.name: Eruption Drive
eruption_drive.description: Superheated momentum drives the blade forward like a volcanic charge.

whirlpool_bind.name: Whirlpool Bind
whirlpool_bind.description: Traps the opponent in a swirling vortex, sapping their spin.

cyclone_shield.name: Cyclone Shield
cyclone_shield.description: A wall of spinning air deflects incoming attacks.

quake_wall.name: Quake Wall
quake_wall.description: A barrier of stone and soil absorbs devastating hits.

static_field.name: Static Field
static_field.description: An electric field disrupts the opponent's stability and rhythm.

glacial_slow.name: Glacial Slow
glacial_slow.description: Creeping frost locks the opponent's rotation, reducing their speed.

void_drain.name: Void Drain
void_drain.description: Dark energy siphons spin power from the opponent's core.

prism_break.name: Prism Break
prism_break.description: Refracted light focuses into a piercing beam of destruction.

rush_launch.name: Rush Launch
rush_launch.description: A quick, aggressive launch that catches the opponent off guard.

spin_steal.name: Spin Steal
spin_steal.description: Reverses contact friction to drain the opponent's rotational energy.

guard_stance.name: Guard Stance
guard_stance.description: Shifts to a low, stable position to weather incoming attacks.

full_power.name: Full Power
full_power.description: Channels all remaining energy into one decisive strike.

xtreme_burst.name: Xtreme Burst
xtreme_burst.description: An all-or-nothing impact designed to shatter the opponent's lock.

burst_breaker.name: Burst Breaker
burst_breaker.description: Targets the opponent's weakest joint, forcing a burst finish.

critical_smash.name: Critical Smash
critical_smash.description: A devastating collision with maximum burst potential. Miss and you pay.

impact_flash.name: Impact Flash
impact_flash.description: A flash of light marks the point of impact as the lock gives way.

iron_wall.name: Iron Wall
iron_wall.description: An immovable defensive stance that laughs at weak attacks.

ember_rush.name: Ember Rush
ember_rush.description: A rapid series of fiery collisions that chip away at resistance.

storm_surge.name: Storm Surge
storm_surge.description: Rising water pressure builds into a forceful wave attack.

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.description: Electric arcs bounce between contact points for sustained damage.

blizzard_veil.name: Blizzard Veil
blizzard_veil.description: A freezing mist coats the blade, hardening its outer shell.

dark_pulse.name: Dark Pulse
dark_pulse.description: A pulse of dark energy destabilizes the opponent's axis of rotation.
